name: Publer
highlight_text: Best for automating basic post-scheduling activities
description:
What Publer Does

Publer covers all the basics of post scheduling, including automated and bulk scheduling. It lets you schedule tweets manually or automatically on X or other social platforms. It provides analytics to track post performance. Publer also provides watermarking to protect your brand and increase brand awareness.

Source: G2.

Key Features

  • Publer’s predefined calendar offers: some text
    • Automated scheduling
    • Bulk updates scheduling.
    • Support for media elements like links, photos, albums, or videos.  
    • Features for recurring post schedule. 
  • Watermarking feature for images and videos.
  • Collaborative workspaces. 
  • Data analytics features for informed decision-making 

Benefits of Publer

Publer does the basics well while also providing advanced features. Below are the platform’s benefits:

  • Publer is a value-for-money media post scheduler for X. 
  • Efficiency and time-saving through bulk and automated post scheduling.
  • Consistency of posting through recurring posts (tweets) scheduling.
  • Publer supports various types of content, e.g.multi-photo posts, albums, and videos 
  • The collaboration and analysis features allow you to refine posts with expert inputs.

Pricing

Publer offers three plans:

  •  Free Twitter Schedulersome text
    • 3 social accounts
    • One X account
  • Professional: USD 9.6  /month  some text
    •  3 social accounts
    • Multiple X accounts
  • Business: USD 16.8  /month  some text
    •  3 social accounts
    • Multiple X accounts

Pros

✅User-friendly platform 

✅Publer plans offer good price-to-value options (free option available).

✅Advanced scheduling features for multiple content types 

Cons

🚫Limited features  

🚫Limited analytics and reporting.
